items.title: Static audit
items.desc: Reads your test code only - no runtime, no execution

items.desc: locator + getBy*, cy.get / contains / find, aliases & chains

items.desc: By.* locators in .java files, via folder scan (beta)

items.desc: fragile / stable / context / dynamic, by shape

items.desc: Flags framework ids (React, Radix, MUI...) that change between builds

items.title: Coverage
items.desc: What was classified, and what is dynamic (the blind spot)

items.title: Why, not just what
items.desc: Explains the reason and suggests a sturdier locator - never auto-fixes

items.title: Duplicates & hot files
items.desc: Same selector across N places; files ranked by fragile

items.title: Filters & sort
items.desc: Show only fragile or hide a kind; sort by file, duplicates or hot files

items.desc: Download HTML / PDF, or save a report to your account

items.desc: Folder analyzed in your browser - code never leaves the page

items.title: Open source
items.desc: MIT, no signup, no data collected
